ddls:
CREATE TABLE "books" (
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each book */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the book */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who wrote the book */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre the book belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the book was published */,
  "isbn" TEXT /* ISBN of the book */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the book was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the book was last updated */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publisher */,
  "book_format" TEXT /* Format of the book (hardcover, paperback, e-book) */,
  "page_count" INTEGER /* Number of pages in the book */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the book */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the book */,
  "cover_image" TEXT /* URL of the book's cover image */,
  "pdf_sample" TEXT /* URL of the book's PDF sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_publisher_id FOREIGN KEY ("publisher_id") REFERENCES publishers ("publisher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the author */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the author */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Death date of the author (if applicable) */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the author */,
  "photo" TEXT /* URL of the author's photo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent genre (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publishers" (
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publisher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the publisher */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the publisher */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the publisher */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the publisher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_publishers" (
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publisher */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the book was published by the publisher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_id", "publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the customer was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the customer was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was made */,
  "total" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g. pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the book in the order */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the book in the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id", "book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the review (1-5) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the review was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g. author, editor, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions of the role (e.g. create, read, update, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views for the book */,
  "downloads" INTEGER /* Number of downloads for the book */,
  "sales" INTEGER /* Number of sales for the book */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating for the book */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the analytics data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended book */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the recommendation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the recommendation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id", "book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the order */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subscriptions" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "subscription_plan" TEXT /* Subscription plan of the customer */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the subscription */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the subscription */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book */,
  "promotion_type" TEXT /* Type of promotion (e.g. discount, free shipping) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount amount for the promotion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_id", "promotion_type")
)
